scripts.test: node tests/telegram-format.test.js && node tests/signals-logic.test.js && node tests/pin-vault.test.js && node tests/charts.test.js && node tests/market-data-global.test.js && node tests/calc-regression.test.js && node tests/worker/karat-math.test.mjs && node tests/worker/psx-universe.test.mjs && node tests/worker/snapshot-shape.test.mjs && playwright test
scripts.cap:init: npx cap add ios 2>/dev/null || true && npx cap sync ios
scripts.gallery:
CAPTURE_SCREENSHOTS=1 playwright test tests/screenshots.spec.js && node scripts/embed-gallery-manifest.mjs && echo '
Offline: npm run gallery:open | Server: npm run gallery:view'
